div.h1: Sequence: NACK with Retry and Eventual Poison

p.em: Engineers: Reference this for Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) state transitions.

ol.li: Atomics: InFlightTracker.Remove must succeed before PendingQueue.Requeue.
Visibility: Re-queued messages must respect visibility_timeout configured in M2-Config.
DLQ Context: poisonMsg must include X-Original-Reason and X-Retry-Count headers.

g.text: M4 Spec: DLQ requires TTL of 72h
